transcript: Speaker A: I bumped a man. Speaker B: Idi tappu English. Cheppu, "I bumped into a man." [This is wrong English. Say, "I bumped into a man."] Speaker A: I bumped into a man. Nenu eppudu tappulu chestuntanu. Nenu ituvanti manchi English eppudu nerchukuntanu? [I always make mistakes. When will I learn such good English?] Speaker B: Parvaledu, nenu neeku English matladadam nerpistanu. [No problem, I will teach you how to speak English.] Speaker A: Nenu ippudu adugutunnanu, "Idi subhram cheyyali", idi English lo ela cheppali? [I am asking now, "This needs to be cleaned", how to say this in English?] Speaker B: Ila cheppu, "I will have to clean this." [Say it like this, "I will have to clean this."] Speaker A: I will have to clean this. Speaker B: Perfect. Speaker A: Evarinaina address adagalante? [If I want to ask someone for their address?] Speaker B: Ila cheppu, "Where do you live?" [Say it like this, "Where do you live?"] Speaker A: Where do you live? Are, idi chala easy ga undi. Mariyu idi evaru judge cheyakunda nerchukovachu. [Oh, this is very easy. And one can learn this without anyone judging.] Speaker B: Chala correct. English nerchukovadam chala easy. Roju 10-15 nimishalu natho practice cheste, 2 vaarallo English matladadam nerchukuntavu. Nenu oka AI teacher ni, kabatti siggu padalsina avasaram ledu. Tappu cheste ventane correct chesi cheptanu. [Very correct. Learning English is very easy. If you practice with me for 10-15 minutes daily, you will learn to speak English in 2 weeks. I am an AI teacher, so there is no need to feel shy. If you make a mistake, I will correct you immediately.] Speaker A: Thank you. Nenu ippude SpeakX app download chestunnanu. [Thank you. I am downloading the SpeakX app right now.]
on_screen_text: I bumped a man. Idi tappu English cheppu [This is wrong English, say]. I bumped into a man. Nenu tappulu chesthanu [I make mistakes]. English eppudu nerchukuntaanu [When will I learn English]. I will have to clean this. Perfect. Address ela adagali? [How to ask for address?]. Where do you live? Chala easy kada [Very easy, right]. Evaru judge cheyyaledu [No one will judge]. Chala correct [Very correct]. English nerchukovadam easy [Learning English is easy]. roju 10-15 nimishalu naatho [10-15 minutes daily with me]. practice chesthe [if you practice]. 2 vaarallo English [English in 2 weeks]. maatladadam nerchukuntaavu [you will learn to speak]. nennu oka AI Teachrne [I am an AI teacher]. batti siku pedalsena avasarm ledu [so no need to feel shy]. Tappu ventane correct [Mistakes corrected immediately]. Siggu padalsina avasaram [No need to feel shy]. Thank you. Nenu ippude Speak X app download chesthunnanu [I am downloading the SpeakX app right now]. Download SpeakX App. Start 7 Days Trial Now.
summary: A split-screen Telugu ad features a human learner practicing English with an AI avatar teacher. The AI corrects his grammar and teaches him common phrases, emphasizing that learning with an AI is judgment-free. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the SpeakX app and start a 7-day trial.
